title: The Big Cheese All-Weather Rodent Block - 30 x 10g, For Mice and Rats, Damp-Proof, Weather-Resistant - Super Strength and Highly effective, Pet Safe, Blue
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: RELIABLE RESULTS – Experience effective control of rats and mice with this all-weather block. This moisture-resistant rat and mouse formulation stays fresh and highly palatable even in damp conditions making it suitable for indoor and outdoor use

HIGHLY EFFECTIVE – Specially formulated super strength food block made with high-quality materials and flavours to create a palatable block that attracts mice and rats. The fast-acting formula delivers safe and reliable results every time

SAFETY FIRST – Use All-Weather Block Bait with The Big Cheese Rat & Mouse Bait Station (STV179) to ensure safety around children and pets. A tamper-resistant station is required by law. Gloves are included for safe handling. It offers a safer choice for your home and garden use

EASY TO USE – Each pack includes 15 ready-to-use blocks. Simply place 6-10 blocks every 5-10 metres for rats and 2-3 blocks every 2-5 metres for mice. Regularly check stations, remove rodents and refill as needed. Multi-packs available: 30 x 10g (2 pack) and 30 x 10g (3 pack)

RESPONSIBLY DESIGEND Infused with a bitter taste to prevent accidental ingestion in wildlife, pets and children while remaining tasty to rats and mice. Bright blue bait for easy identification & max visibility.

RODENT CONTROL MADE EASY – Tackling rodent infestations around the home can seem daunting. With formulations for every situation, as well as low toxicity, The Big Cheese takes the stress out of controlling rodent pests. Solve your rodent control problem with The Big Cheese pest control products
description: From the manufacturer All-Weather Bait Block - 15 x 10g All-Weather Block Bait - 6 x 10g All-Weather Block Bait - 30 x 10g Ready-Baited Rat Trap Kit Rat and Mouse Bait Station Mouse and Rat Attractant - 26g Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 5,478 4.2 out of 5 stars 1,135 4.3 out of 5 stars 16,487 3.9 out of 5 stars 384 4.4 out of 5 stars 6,473 3.8 out of 5 stars 4,327 Description Ready-for-use bait blocks for the control of rats and mice indoors in the home or outdoors around buildings. Stays fresh in both wet and dry weather conditions. Ready-for-use bait blocks for the control of rats and mice indoors in the home or outdoors around buildings. Stays fresh in both wet and dry weather conditions. Ready-for-use bait blocks for the control of rats and mice indoors in the home or outdoors around buildings. Stays fresh in both wet and dry weather conditions. This rat trap kit effectively controls rodent infestations indoors and out. The kit is lockable and tamper-resistant, and it will keep captured rodents hidden from sight. Compact, tamper-resistant bait station with lockable lid to help protect children and pets from contact with bait (not included). Designed for use with all types of bait. Fresh 'n Tasty trap bait paste from The Big Cheese increases the catch rate in all types of rodent traps including snap and cage traps. Re-bait up to 60 traps.
